mechanism_narrative: A low and stable federal funds rate indicates an accommodative monetary policy, reducing the cost of capital and supporting equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the S&P 500 20-day forward returns are consistently negative or flat when FEDFUNDS is below 2% over a 3-year period.

mechanism_narrative: A significant rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which typically precedes or accompanies economic downturns, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns as corporate earnings expectations decline.
evidence_refs: fact:historical recessions often follow UNRATE spikes
failure_condition: If S&P 500 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 50% of instances where UNRATE rises by more than 0.5 percentage points over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales combined with a low federal funds rate indicates robust consumer demand supported by accommodative monetary conditions, boosting corporate revenues and profitability, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If periods of strong RSAFS growth (>5% YoY) and low FEDFUNDS (<2%) do not correlate with positive S&P 500 20-day returns over a 5-year period.

mechanism_narrative: High and accelerating inflation (CPIAUCSL) in a tightening monetary regime forces central banks to raise rates, increasing discount rates and eroding real earnings, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If S&P 500 5-day returns are positive or flat during periods where CPIAUCSL YoY is above 3% and FEDFUNDS is actively rising.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in housing starts indicates strong underlying economic demand and consumer confidence, which typically translates into broader economic growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If S&P 500 60-day forward returns are negative or flat when HOUST shows a sustained 10% YoY increase over a 3-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Robust industrial production growth signals strong manufacturing and supply-side activity, indicating healthy corporate output and earnings, which supports positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of instances where INDPRO 3-month average growth exceeds 0.5% MoM.

mechanism_narrative: Strong non-farm payrolls growth indicates a healthy and expanding labor market, leading to increased consumer spending and corporate profits, which supports positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If S&P 500 5-day forward returns are negative or flat in more than 40% of instances where PAYEMS MoM change exceeds 150k over a 5-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Declining GDP growth coupled with a rising unemployment rate signifies a severe economic contraction, leading to significant declines in corporate earnings and thus negative S&P 500 forward returns.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 YoY < 1% AND UNRATE rises > 0.3pp in 6 months
failure_condition: If S&P 500 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 30% of instances where GDPC1 YoY is below 1% and UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 6 months.
